---
title: "About"
---

I am Nga Nguyen, but you can call me Daisy.

I am a Senior at Lawrence University, pursuing Physics and Computer Science. I'm currently working on computational plasma physics, and I am aspire to develop high-fidelity models to rigorously study plasma instabilities and turbulence, alongside reduced-order models capable of predicting the real-time onset of instabilities in next-generation fusion systems.
